tasks.label: build
args: C:/msys64/mingw64/bin/g++.exe -std=c++20 -g src/core/main.cpp src/core/GameLoop.cpp src/platform/Window.cpp -o build/game.exe -Isrc -IC:/msys64/mingw64/include -LC:/msys64/mingw64/lib -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system && copy /y C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\libsfml-graphics-3.dll build\sfml-graphics-2.dll && copy /y C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\libsfml-window-3.dll build\sfml-window-2.dll && copy /y C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\libsfml-system-3.dll build\sfml-system-2.dll && copy /y C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\libgcc_s_seh-1.dll build\ && copy /y C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\libstdc++-6.dll build\ && copy /y C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\libwinpthread-1.dll build\
